Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3

Class FlixelLwjgl3ChainingWindowListener

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.FlixelLwjgl3ChainingWindowListener
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.badlogic.gdx.backends.lwjgl3.Lwjgl3WindowListener
public final class FlixelLwjgl3ChainingWindowListener extends Object implements com.badlogic.gdx.backends.lwjgl3.Lwjgl3WindowListener
Outermost GLFW listener that can veto close requests when absorption is enabled.
